Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}You guys wanna check out this {f 4 4 0 37 1 16774} with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}Are you serious? We have more important things to do, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2036 0 0}Wait, hear me out! We found this in the Abyss of Time, so it coulda been made by our minds or somethin', right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}And I've actually wanted to watch this series for a while anyways. Look how productive I'm bein'![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2103 0 0}I so totally don't! This is some serious shit right here![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}I mean, it does happen to be a series I've been wantin' to watch, but that's just a coincidence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}C'mooon, just one episode? Then I'll shut up about it, I swear![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}Only one episode, remember? No trying to get us to watch more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 4 25 25}Man, shit's hittin' the fan now, huh? Talk about the fate of the entire world...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1101 0 0}No kidding... And the production is insane![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Whew... That was a close one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}They didn't resolve anything! What ended up happening to the daughter!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Yeah, these foreign shows do that a lot. They always got so much goin' on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}But damn, Yuka-tan... For someone who was so against watching it, you sure got into it, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1035 0 0}Well... You were so loud, I had to pay extra attention to it to tune you out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}Anyway, what are we even doing? This is a waste of time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}I'll admit, it was fun, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 52 -1 0 0}Well... It was kinda relaxing, so... It's probably fine once in a while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 52 -1 0 0}It's not like we'd be able to give it everything we've got when we really need to if we're stressed out all the time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems watching the drama has helped Yukari-san acknowledge the value of taking breaks...[n]{f 1 1}
